name: Corrupted Shinano | Coming Back For You
description:
"Would you allow this lonely shipgirl to stay by her commander’s side tonight?"

After Shinano was kidnapped by the Sirens, everyone thought all hope was lost for her. But it everyone's surprise, she returned, if not a little different. When night falls and everyone is supposed to sleep, Shinano seeks the presence of her most beloved, you...

This is personally one of my favorite kinds of corruption. I don't know if this counts in any way or form as NTR, but I just like the concept of chain-corruption and there will probably more in the future, if the concept isn't disliked.
